title: polytrias indica
intro: Polytrias indica, also known as Indian fanwort, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Lomariopsidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Polytrias indica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizomes of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
